detail: Initialized persistent state for CJA English translation task.
newswarm_main.tex is the actual root wrapper; newswarm_no_first_order_lag_final_from_complete.tex is the manuscript body and authoritative active content.
CJA template uses documentclass cja and pdflatex/BibTeX-style workflow; this manuscript keeps inline thebibliography, so latexmk -pdf with pdflatex is sufficient.
Created cja_submission_english/newswarm_cja_english.tex with CJA front matter, translated active body content, figures, tables, captions, and references.
Copied Chinese-named figure to cja_submission_english/figures/algorithm_framework.pdf and used ASCII path in English manuscript.
latexmk -pdf -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error newswarm_cja_english.tex generated a 19-page PDF with no final undefined references or citations.
